name: Quail Brandon
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a small amount of olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Brown the quail breasts on each side until golden brown.
3. Drain excess oil from the quail breasts.
4. In a separate pan, melt butter and melt.
5. Add seasonings, juice, garlic powder, parsley flakes, salt, pepper, nutmeg, celery salt, and bitters to the melted butter.
6. Stir until all ingredients are thoroughly mixed.
7. Add sliced mushrooms and optional cooking sherry.
8. Place quail breasts in a covered baking dish and pour the butter mixture over them, ensuring that all meat is covered.
9. Bake at 325°F for approximately 45 minutes or until the quail is tender.
10. Keep the baking dish covered to prevent the quail from drying out.
11. Serve the cooked quail with the sauce over egg noodles.
